title: pyrus esserteauana
side_effects: Pyrus esserteauana can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing digestive issues, nausea, and vomiting in individuals who consume its fruit or leaves without proper preparation. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap may lead to skin irritation, allergic reactions, and dermatitis. In severe cases, improper use of Pyrus esserteauana can cause liver damage, kidney problems, and even respiratory failure. It is essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
